debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

    simp [List.length_filter_add_length_filter_neg_eq, List.filter_append]
    have : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall m S c) ∨ (isFinalCall m S c) ∨ (¬isInitialCall m S c ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c) := by
      intro c hc
      by_cases h1 : isInitialCall m S c <;> by_cases h2 : isFinalCall m S c <;> simp_all

        apply List.perm_filter_filter_filter_of_predicate_partition
        exact fun c hc => by
          by_cases h1 : isInitialCall m S c <;> by_cases h2 : isFinalCall m S c <;> simp_all
      · exact List.nodup_of_nodup_reverse (List.reverse_involutive ▸ List.nodup_reverse.2 (List.nodup_enum_from _))
    rw this
    simp [List.length_append]

    simp only [List.filter, List.length]
    have : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall S c) ∨ (¬isInitialCall S c ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c) ∨ (isFinalCall S c) := by
      intro c hc
      by_cases h1 : isInitialCall S c <;> by_cases h2 : isFinalCall S c <;> simp_all

            List.countP (fun c => ¬isInitialCall S c ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c) S +
            List.countP (fun c => isFinalCall S c) S = S.length := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Nat.add_right_cancel
      rw [← List.sum_map_length_eq_length_filter]
      have : List.map (fun c => if isInitialCall S c then 1 else if ¬isInitialCall S c ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c then 1 else if isFinalCall S c then 1 else 0) S =
             List.replicate S.length 1 := by
        apply List.map_congr
        intro c hc
        have := this c hc
        split_ifs <;> simp_all
      simp [this]
    simp_all
